suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify backend-worker skill expectations around tests-first (RED) versus implementation-first for small fix features, and require explicit handoff justification when deviating.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review web-ui-scrutiny-fixes notes implementation edits in snipsnap/web/app.py and snipsnap/web/static/index.html occurred before most new tests in tests/test_web.py while handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.
